text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, AI programs can create paintings, compose music, and even write stories. Some people worry this means machines are replacing human artists. However, there is a big difference between human and machine creativity. AI works by learning from existing art or music and combining patterns in new ways. It doesn't have feelings, personal experiences, or a unique point of view. Human creativity comes from life, emotion, and imagination. Many artists now use AI as a tool to inspire new ideas or speed up their work. So rather than replacing human creativity, AI is becoming a helper that expands what we can create.
